Lily: Let's play doctor.
Max: I will be the doctor. You be sick.
Lily: Okay. My stomach hurt.
Max: Open mouth. Speak up.

Max: You have too many cookies inside.
Lily: What is the medicine?
Max: No more cookies. And drink water.
Lily: That not fun medicine.
Max: Sorry. Doctor orders.

Lily: I want more juice!
Max: Me too me too!
Lily: Apple juice. Not orange. Orange is sour.
Max: I like orange.
Lily: You do? It sour!
Max: I like sour.
Lily: That weird.
Max: You weird!
Lily: Okay we both weird.

Lily: Count with me! One two three!
Max: Four five six!
Lily: Seven eight nine TEN!
Max: We counted!
Lily: I know more! Eleven.. Twelve..
Max: Thirteen fourteen..
Lily: I forget what come after.
Max: Me too. Fifteen?
Lily: I think so. Fifteen!
Max: We so smart.

Max: Spaghetti is my favorite.
Lily: How do you say it? Spa-getti?
Max: Yes! Spaghetti!
Lily: Spaghetti. I say that too.
Max: With the red sauce. Yummy.
Lily: I like cheesy one.
Max: Mac and cheese?
Lily: Yes! Yellow and stretchy.
Max: Now I am hungry.

Max: I am building tower. Very very tall.
Lily: I help?
Max: Yes. Put block here.
Lily: Like this?
Max: No no. Careful. Slow.
Lily: Oops. Fell down.
Max: No! All gone.
Lily: We can build again? Bigger?
Max: Yes! Super big tower!

Lily: Look! My ball goes bouncy bouncy!
Max: Give me! I want bouncy too!
Lily: No! Mine ball!
Max: Please? I will be careful.
Lily: Okay. One turn. Then mine again.
Max: Thank you!
Lily: Catch! Throw it back!
Max: I caught it! I caught it!

Max: I do not like broccoli.
Lily: Me neither. It green and yucky.
Max: Mommy says eat it. It make you big.
Lily: I don't want to be big.
Max: Me neither.
Lily: If I eat it can I have cookie?
Max: I always ask that too.
Lily: What Mommy says?
Max: She sayss maybe. Maybe means yes sometimes.

Max: Here. Pretend milk.
Lily: Thank you mommy.
Max: Now go sleep. It night time.
Lily: I am not sleepy!
Max: Baby you need sleep. I sing song.
Lily: Okay. Sing twinkle twinkle.
Max: Twinkle twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are..

Lily: Teddy bear keep me safe at night.
Max: I have bunny. Pink bunny.
Lily: What is the bunny's name?
Max: Bunny.
Lily: That bunny name? Just Bunny?
Max: Yes. That his name.
Lily: My teddy name is Mr. Bear.
Max: We same! We pick easy names.
Lily: They best friends like us.
Max: Yes! Mr. Bear and Bunny. Best friends!

Max: Count with me! One two three!
Lily: Four five six!
Max: Seven eight nine TEN!
Lily: We counted!
Max: I know more! Eleven.. Twelve..
Lily: Thirteen fourteen..
Max: I forget what come after.
Lily: Me too. Fifteen?
Max: I think so. Fifteen!
Lily: We so smart.

Lily: You be the dragon, I be the princess.
Max: Okay. ROAAARRR!
Lily: No! Dragon coming! I run!
Max: I catch you! !
Lily: No wait. I magic princess. Poof! You a frog now!
Max: I am a frog?
Lily: Yes. Silly little frog.
Max: I want to be dragon again!
Lily: Okay. I do magic again. Poof! You a dragon!
Max: ROAARRR! Thank you princess.

Lily: Dolly is sleeping.
Max: Why she is sleeping?
Lily: Because she tired. Like me at night.
Max: I tuck her in?
Lily: Okay but soft. She tiny.
Max: Night night dolly.
Lily: She sayss thank you.
Max: Can I hold her now?
Lily: After she wake up.

Max: I have three fingers.
Lily: That not free. That three.
Max: I know. Free mean three.
Lily: Okay. I have five fingers. On one hand.
Max: Two hands how many?
Lily: Umm. Five.. And five..
Max: Ten! Five plus five is ten!
Lily: How do you know that?
Max: Daddy taught me. He very smart.

Lily: Look! My ball goes bouncy bouncy!
Max: Give me! I want bouncy too!
Lily: No! Mine ball!
Max: Please? I will be careful.
Lily: Okay. One turn. Then mine again.
Max: Thank you!
Lily: Catch! Throw it back!
Max: I caught it! I caught it!

Max: You happy today?
Lily: Yes! We are going to park later!
Max: I love park!
Lily: The slide is my favorite. The twisty one!
Max: I like swings. Go high high!
Lily: I am scared of going too high.
Max: Swings are safe. Daddy hold me first time.
Lily: Maybe I try if you hold my hand.
Max: Okay I hold your hand. We go together.

Lily: No! All gone.

Lily: Yes! Super big tower!

Lily: No they blue. Look at the name. BLUE-berry.
Max: Yeah. You right.

Lily: She love everyone. She sayss yes.

Max: I ask her? She sayss yes?
Lily: She love everyone. She sayss yes.

Lily: Ten! Five plus five is ten!

Lily: Daddy taught me. He very smart.

Lily: Maybe she can be your grandma too.
Max: I ask her? She sayss yes?
Lily: She love everyone. She sayss yes.

Max: I am not sleepy.
Lily: Me neither. But they turning off lights.

Lily: Me too. Cartoons!

Lily: One more is never enough.
Max: I know. I always want more.
Lily: Maybe if we ask nice?
Max: I already tried. She said sleep time is sleep time.
Lily: Sleep time is boring time.

Lily: Yes! Big no no!

Max: I have two legs.
Lily: Me too! We same!

Max: She sayss maybe. Maybe means yes sometimes.

Lily: Mommy says no. Shoes get wet.
Max: I take shoes off!
Lily: You sneaky.
Max: She still say no.
Lily: Mommys always say no to fun stuff.

Lily: Okay. I have five fingers. On one hand.
Max: Two hands how many?
Lily: Umm. Five.. And five..
Max: Ten! Five plus five is ten!
Lily: How do you know that?
Max: Daddy taught me. He very smart.

Max: I am building tower. Very very tall.
Lily: I help?
Max: Yes. Put block here.
Lily: Like this?
Max: No no. Careful. Slow.
Lily: Oops. Fell down.
Max: No! All gone.
Lily: We can build again? Bigger?
Max: Yes! Super big tower!

Lily: I have baby sister.
Max: Is she nice?

Lily: Twinkle twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are..

Lily: Grandma coming today!
Max: Grandma gives cookies?
Lily: Always! And she hug so warm.
Max: My grandma smell like flowers.
Lily: Mine smell like cake.
Max: Best smells!
Lily: I love Grandma so much.
Max: Me too. Even she not my grandma.
Lily: Maybe she can be your grandma too.
Max: I ask her? She sayss yes?
Lily: She love everyone. She sayss yes.

Max: I have three fingers.
Lily: That not free. That three.
Max: I know. Free mean three.
Lily: Okay. I have five fingers. On one hand.
Max: Two hands how many?
Lily: Umm. Five.. And five..
Max: Ten! Five plus five is ten!
Lily: How do you know that?
Max: Daddy taught me. He very smart.

Lily: I am scared of dark.
Max: Me too. Monsters in dark.
Lily: Daddy says no monsters.
Max: But what if he wrong?
Lily: He never wrong. He a daddy.
Max: My daddy wrong sometimes.
Lily: What he wrong about?
Max: He says rain come from clouds but I think from sky shower.
Lily: Hm. Maybe same thing.

Lily: I want more juice!
Max: Me too me too!
Lily: Apple juice. Not orange. Orange is sour.
Max: I like orange.
Lily: You do? It sour!
Max: I like sour.
Lily: That weird.
Max: You weird!
Lily: Okay we both weird.

Lily: Maybe angels. Mommy says maybe.

Max: I caught it! I caught it!

Lily: I will be the doctor. You be sick.
Max: Okay. My stomach hurt.
Lily: Open mouth. Speak up.

Lily: You have too many cookies inside.
Max: What is the medicine?
Lily: No more cookies. And drink water.
Max: That not fun medicine.
Lily: Sorry. Doctor orders.

Lily: My fish died.
Max: No. Where did it go?
Lily: Daddy said it went to sleep forever.
Max: Forever sleep?
Lily: Yeah. I am sad.
Max: I hug you.
Lily: Thank you. You nice.
Max: Can we get a new fish?
Lily: Mommy says maybe. Maybe orange one.

Max: You scared of spiders?
Lily: Yes! Big no no!
Max: Me too. They have too many legs.
Lily: How many legs?
Max: Eight. Eight legs!
Lily: Eight! That a LOT of legs.
Max: I have two legs.
Lily: Me too! We same!

Lily: I am not sleepy.
Max: Me neither. But they turning off lights.
Lily: I want to stay up. Watch TV.
Max: Me too. Cartoons!
Lily: Mommy says one more cartoon. Then sleep.
Max: One more is never enough.
Lily: I know. I always want more.
Max: Maybe if we ask nice?
Lily: I already tried. She said sleep time is sleep time.
Max: Sleep time is boring time.

Lily: Look! My ball goes bouncy bouncy!
Max: Give me! I want bouncy too!
Lily: No! Mine ball!
Max: Please? I will be careful.
Lily: Okay. One turn. Then mine again.
Max: Thank you!
Lily: Catch! Throw it back!
Max: I caught it! I caught it!

Max: My truck is biiiig.
Lily: My car goes faster!
Max: Look how fast!
Lily: Mine goes !
Max: They crashed! !
Lily: Do again!
Max: Okay okay. One two free.. !
Lily: Again again!

Lily: I am building tower. Very very tall.
Max: I help?
Lily: Yes. Put block here.
Max: Like this?
Lily: No no. Careful. Slow.
Max: Oops. Fell down.
Lily: No! All gone.
Max: We can build again? Bigger?
Lily: Yes! Super big tower!

Max: No. Red is important.
Lily: I know! How I color fire now?
Max: Use orange?
Lily: Orange not same.
Max: I have red. You can use mine.
Lily: Really? You best friend.

Lily: I am coloring sun. What color is the sun?
Max: Yellow! Sun is yellow!
Lily: And orange too, right?
Max: Yeah when it go down. My daddy showed me.
Lily: Sunset! Mommy takes pictures of sunset.
Max: Pretty colors. Pink and orange and purple.
Lily: Sky is so pretty.
Max: Who painted it?
Lily: Maybe angels. Mommy says maybe.

Max: I have baby sister.
Lily: Is she nice?
Max: Sometimes. She cries a lot.
Lily: Why she cries?
Max: She cannot talk yet. So she cries to say stuff.
Lily: Like when I was a baby?
Max: Yes! We all was babies.
Lily: Even Mommy and Daddy?
Max: Yes! They was tiny babies!
Lily: Tiny Daddy. Funny.

Max: I am making pretend cake.
Lily: For who?
Max: For my teddy birthday.
Lily: Today teddy birthday?
Max: Yes! He three years old. Same as me!
Lily: I want cake too.
Max: Okay. Here. Pretend cake.
Lily: Yummy. What flavor?
Max: Strawberry and rainbow.
Lily: Rainbow not a flavor.
Max: In my cake it is.

Lily: I do not like broccoli.
Max: Me neither. It green and yucky.
Lily: Mommy says eat it. It make you big.
Max: I don't want to be big.
Lily: Me neither.
Max: If I eat it can I have cookie?
Lily: I always ask that too.
Max: What Mommy says?
Lily: She sayss maybe. Maybe means yes sometimes.

Max: I have three fingers.
Lily: That not free. That three.
Max: I know. Free mean three.
Lily: Okay. I have five fingers. On one hand.
Max: Two hands how many?
Lily: Umm. Five.. And five..
Max: Ten! Five plus five is ten!
Lily: How do you know that?
Max: Daddy taught me. He very smart.

Max: You happy today?
Lily: Yes! We are going to park later!
Max: I love park!
Lily: The slide is my favorite. The twisty one!
Max: I like swings. Go high high!
Lily: I am scared of going too high.
Max: Swings are safe. Daddy hold me first time.
Lily: Maybe I try if you hold my hand.
Max: Okay I hold your hand. We go together.

Max: What is your favorite color?
Lily: Pink! No wait. Purple!
Max: Mine is blue. Sky blue.
Lily: Blue is nice. Like water!
Max: And sky. And blueberries.
Lily: Blueberries are purple.
Max: No they blue. Look at the name. BLUE-berry.
Lily: Yeah. You right.

Lily: I have baby sister.
Max: Is she nice?
Lily: Sometimes. She cries a lot.
Max: Why she cries?
Lily: She cannot talk yet. So she cries to say stuff.
Max: Like when I was a baby?
Lily: Yes! We all was babies.
Max: Even Mommy and Daddy?
Lily: Yes! They was tiny babies!
Max: Tiny Daddy. Funny.

Lily: I saw a butterfly!
Max: Where? Where?
Lily: Over there. Yellow one!
Max: I do not see it.
Lily: It flew away.
Max: I want butterfly.
Lily: We cannot catch it. Mommy says.
Max: Why?
Lily: Because it will be scared.
Max: Okay. Poor butterfly.

Max: Count with me! One two three!
Lily: Four five six!
Max: Seven eight nine TEN!
Lily: We counted!
Max: I know more! Eleven.. Twelve..
Lily: Thirteen fourteen..
Max: I forget what come after.
Lily: Me too. Fifteen?
Max: I think so. Fifteen!
Lily: We so smart.

Max: I have three fingers.
Lily: That not free. That three.
Max: I know. Free mean three.
Lily: Okay. I have five fingers. On one hand.
Max: Two hands how many?
Lily: Umm. Five.. And five..
Max: Ten! Five plus five is ten!
Lily: How do you know that?
Max: Daddy taught me. He very smart.

Max: We same! We pick easy names.
Lily: They best friends like us.
Max: Yes! Mr. Bear and Bunny. Best friends!

Lily: He says rain come from clouds but I think from sky shower.
Max: Hm. Maybe same thing.

Lily: I have three fingers.
Max: That not free. That three.
Lily: I know. Free mean three.
Max: Okay. I have five fingers. On one hand.
Lily: Two hands how many?
Max: Umm. Five.. And five..
Lily: Ten! Five plus five is ten!
Max: How do you know that?
Lily: Daddy taught me. He very smart.

Lily: I am scared of dark.
Max: Me too. Monsters in dark.
Lily: Daddy says no monsters.
Max: But what if he wrong?
Lily: He never wrong. He a daddy.
Max: My daddy wrong sometimes.
Lily: What he wrong about?
Max: He says rain come from clouds but I think from sky shower.
Lily: Hm. Maybe same thing.

Lily: And orange too, right?
Max: Yeah when it go down. My daddy showed me.
Lily: Sunset! Mommy takes pictures of sunset.
Max: Pretty colors. Pink and orange and purple.
Lily: Sky is so pretty.
Max: Who painted it?
Lily: Maybe angels. Mommy says maybe.

Lily: I am the mommy, you the baby.
Max: Okay. !
Lily: Baby. What wrong?
Max: Hungry! !
Lily: Here. Pretend milk.
Max: Thank you mommy.

Max: I am not sleepy!
Lily: Baby you need sleep. I sing song.
Max: Okay. Sing twinkle twinkle.
Lily: Twinkle twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are..

Max: Let's play doctor.
Lily: I will be the doctor. You be sick.
Max: Okay. My stomach hurt.
Lily: Open mouth. Speak up.

Lily: You have too many cookies inside.
Max: What is the medicine?
Lily: No more cookies. And drink water.
Max: That not fun medicine.
Lily: Sorry. Doctor orders.

Lily: Now I am hungry.

Max: I have baby sister.
Lily: Is she nice?
Max: Sometimes. She cries a lot.
Lily: Why she cries?
Max: She cannot talk yet. So she cries to say stuff.
Lily: Like when I was a baby?
Max: Yes! We all was babies.
Lily: Even Mommy and Daddy?
Max: Yes! They was tiny babies!
Lily: Tiny Daddy. Funny.

Lily: Dolly is sleeping.
Max: Why she is sleeping?
Lily: Because she tired. Like me at night.
Max: I tuck her in?
Lily: Okay but soft. She tiny.
Max: Night night dolly.
Lily: She sayss thank you.
Max: Can I hold her now?
Lily: After she wake up.

Max: Yes! Super big tower!

Lily: I take shoes off!
Max: You sneaky.
Lily: She still say no.

Lily: My sister broke my crayon. My red one.
Max: No. Red is important.
Lily: I know! How I color fire now?
Max: Use orange?
Lily: Orange not same.
Max: I have red. You can use mine.
Lily: Really? You best friend.
Max: I know.

Max: Snow!! Look look!
Lily: WHERE? I do not see!
Max: Outside window! White everywhere!
Lily: SNOW! We make snowman?
Max: Yes! Big round one!
Lily: With carrot nose?
Max: And button eyes!
Lily: I get scarf for him!
Max: We can name him. Mr. Snowy!
Lily: Mr. Snowy! Hi Mr. Snowy!

Lily: I am making pretend cake.
Max: For who?
Lily: For my teddy birthday.
Max: Today teddy birthday?
Lily: Yes! He three years old. Same as me!
Max: I want cake too.
Lily: Okay. Here. Pretend cake.
Max: Yummy. What flavor?
Lily: Strawberry and rainbow.
Max: Rainbow not a flavor.
Lily: In my cake it is.

Lily: You be the dragon, I be the princess.
Max: Okay. ROAAARRR!
Lily: No! Dragon coming! I run!
Max: I catch you! !
Lily: No wait. I magic princess. Poof! You a frog now!
Max: I am a frog?
Lily: Yes. Silly little frog.
Max: I want to be dragon again!
Lily: Okay. I do magic again. Poof! You a dragon!
Max: ROAARRR! Thank you princess.

Lily: I have three fingers.
Max: That not free. That three.
Lily: I know. Free mean three.
Max: Okay. I have five fingers. On one hand.
Lily: Two hands how many?
Max: Umm. Five.. And five..
Lily: Ten! Five plus five is ten!
Max: How do you know that?
Lily: Daddy taught me. He very smart.

Max: I want more juice!
Lily: Me too me too!
Max: Apple juice. Not orange. Orange is sour.
Lily: I like orange.
Max: You do? It sour!
Lily: I like sour.
Max: That weird.
Lily: You weird!
Max: Okay we both weird.

Lily: Let's play doctor.
Max: I will be the doctor. You be sick.
Lily: Okay. My stomach hurt.
Max: Open mouth. Speak up.

Lily: What is the medicine?
Max: No more cookies. And drink water.
Lily: That not fun medicine.
Max: Sorry. Doctor orders.

Lily: My daddy wrong sometimes.
Max: What he wrong about?
Lily: He says rain come from clouds but I think from sky shower.
Max: Hm. Maybe same thing.

Max: What is your favorite color?
Lily: Pink! No wait. Purple!
Max: Mine is blue. Sky blue.
Lily: Blue is nice. Like water!
Max: And sky. And blueberries.
Lily: Blueberries are purple.
Max: No they blue. Look at the name. BLUE-berry.
Lily: Yeah. You right.

Max: I take shoes off!
Lily: You sneaky.

Lily: Mommys always say no to fun stuff.

Lily: Yes. Silly little frog.

Lily: Apple juice. Not orange. Orange is sour.
Max: I like orange.
Lily: You do? It sour!
Max: I like sour.
Lily: That weird.
Max: You weird!
Lily: Okay we both weird.

Max: No playground.
Lily: But puddles!

Lily: I take shoes off!
Max: You sneaky.

Max: Mommys always say no to fun stuff.

Max: That bunny name? Just Bunny?
Lily: Yes. That his name.
Max: My teddy name is Mr. Bear.
Lily: We same! We pick easy names.
Max: They best friends like us.
Lily: Yes! Mr. Bear and Bunny. Best friends!

Lily: I am mad today.
Max: Why are you mad?
Lily: My sister broke my crayon. My red one.
Max: No. Red is important.

Lily: Orange not same.

Lily: He says rain come from clouds but I think from sky shower.
Max: Hm. Maybe same thing.

Max: I am building tower. Very very tall.
Lily: I help?
Max: Yes. Put block here.
Lily: Like this?
Max: No no. Careful. Slow.
Lily: Oops. Fell down.
Max: No! All gone.
Lily: We can build again? Bigger?
Max: Yes! Super big tower!

Max: My fish died.
Lily: No. Where did it go?
Max: Daddy said it went to sleep forever.
Lily: Forever sleep?
Max: Yeah. I am sad.
Lily: I hug you.
Max: Thank you. You nice.
Lily: Can we get a new fish?
Max: Mommy says maybe. Maybe orange one.

Lily: I do not like broccoli.
Max: Me neither. It green and yucky.
Lily: Mommy says eat it. It make you big.
Max: I don't want to be big.
Lily: Me neither.
Max: If I eat it can I have cookie?
Lily: I always ask that too.
Max: What Mommy says?
Lily: She sayss maybe. Maybe means yes sometimes.

Max: I am scared of dark.
Lily: Me too. Monsters in dark.
Max: Daddy says no monsters.
Lily: But what if he wrong?
Max: He never wrong. He a daddy.
Lily: My daddy wrong sometimes.
Max: What he wrong about?
Lily: He says rain come from clouds but I think from sky shower.
Max: Hm. Maybe same thing.

Lily: Snow!! Look look!
Max: WHERE? I do not see!
Lily: Outside window! White everywhere!
Max: SNOW! We make snowman?
Lily: Yes! Big round one!
Max: With carrot nose?
Lily: And button eyes!
Max: I get scarf for him!
Lily: We can name him. Mr. Snowy!
Max: Mr. Snowy! Hi Mr. Snowy!

Max: Grandma coming today!
Lily: Grandma gives cookies?
Max: Always! And she hug so warm.
Lily: My grandma smell like flowers.
Max: Mine smell like cake.
Lily: Best smells!
Max: I love Grandma so much.
Lily: Me too. Even she not my grandma.
Max: Maybe she can be your grandma too.
Lily: I ask her? She sayss yes?
Max: She love everyone. She sayss yes.

Max: I am scared of dark.
Lily: Me too. Monsters in dark.
Max: Daddy says no monsters.
Lily: But what if he wrong?
Max: He never wrong. He a daddy.
Lily: My daddy wrong sometimes.
Max: What he wrong about?
Lily: He says rain come from clouds but I think from sky shower.
Max: Hm. Maybe same thing.

Lily: Where? Where?
Max: Over there. Yellow one!
Lily: I do not see it.
Max: It flew away.
Lily: I want butterfly.
Max: We cannot catch it. Mommy says.
Lily: Why?
Max: Because it will be scared.
Lily: Okay. Poor butterfly.

Max: Okay but soft. She tiny.

Max: She sayss thank you.

Max: After she wake up.

Lily: You scared of spiders?

Lily: Me too. They have too many legs.

Lily: Eight. Eight legs!
Max: Eight! That a LOT of legs.
Lily: I have two legs.
Max: Me too! We same!

Lily: You happy today?
Max: Yes! We are going to park later!
Lily: I love park!
Max: The slide is my favorite. The twisty one!
Lily: I like swings. Go high high!
Max: I am scared of going too high.
Lily: Swings are safe. Daddy hold me first time.
Max: Maybe I try if you hold my hand.
Lily: Okay I hold your hand. We go together.

Lily: Let's play doctor.
Max: I will be the doctor. You be sick.
Lily: Okay. My stomach hurt.
Max: Open mouth. Speak up.

Max: You have too many cookies inside.
Lily: What is the medicine?
Max: No more cookies. And drink water.
Lily: That not fun medicine.
Max: Sorry. Doctor orders.

Max: My car goes faster!
Lily: Look how fast!
Max: Mine goes !
Lily: They crashed! !
Max: Do again!
Lily: Okay okay. One two free.. !
Max: Again again!

Max: Spaghetti is my favorite.
Lily: How do you say it? Spa-getti?
Max: Yes! Spaghetti!
Lily: Spaghetti. I say that too.
Max: With the red sauce. Yummy.
Lily: I like cheesy one.
Max: Mac and cheese?
Lily: Yes! Yellow and stretchy.
Max: Now I am hungry.

Lily: I am making pretend cake.
Max: For who?
Lily: For my teddy birthday.
Max: Today teddy birthday?
Lily: Yes! He three years old. Same as me!
Max: I want cake too.
Lily: Okay. Here. Pretend cake.
Max: Yummy. What flavor?
Lily: Strawberry and rainbow.
Max: Rainbow not a flavor.
Lily: In my cake it is.

Lily: I have baby sister.
Max: Is she nice?
Lily: Sometimes. She cries a lot.
Max: Why she cries?
Lily: She cannot talk yet. So she cries to say stuff.
Max: Like when I was a baby?
Lily: Yes! We all was babies.
Max: Even Mommy and Daddy?
Lily: Yes! They was tiny babies!
Max: Tiny Daddy. Funny.

Lily: Teddy bear keep me safe at night.
Max: I have bunny. Pink bunny.
Lily: What is the bunny's name?
Max: Bunny.
Lily: That bunny name? Just Bunny?
Max: Yes. That his name.
Lily: My teddy name is Mr. Bear.
Max: We same! We pick easy names.
Lily: They best friends like us.
Max: Yes! Mr. Bear and Bunny. Best friends!

Max: Hm. Maybe same thing.

Max: Snow!! Look look!
Lily: WHERE? I do not see!
Max: Outside window! White everywhere!
Lily: SNOW! We make snowman?
Max: Yes! Big round one!
Lily: With carrot nose?
Max: And button eyes!
Lily: I get scarf for him!
Max: We can name him. Mr. Snowy!
Lily: Mr. Snowy! Hi Mr. Snowy!

Max: I saw a butterfly!
Lily: Where? Where?
Max: Over there. Yellow one!
Lily: I do not see it.
Max: It flew away.
Lily: I want butterfly.
Max: We cannot catch it. Mommy says.
Lily: Why?
Max: Because it will be scared.
Lily: Okay. Poor butterfly.

Lily: I am scared of dark.
Max: Me too. Monsters in dark.
Lily: Daddy says no monsters.
Max: But what if he wrong?
Lily: He never wrong. He a daddy.
Max: My daddy wrong sometimes.
Lily: What he wrong about?
Max: He says rain come from clouds but I think from sky shower.
Lily: Hm. Maybe same thing.

Max: I am not sleepy.
Lily: Me neither. But they turning off lights.
Max: I want to stay up. Watch TV.
Lily: Me too. Cartoons!
Max: Mommy says one more cartoon. Then sleep.
Lily: One more is never enough.
Max: I know. I always want more.
Lily: Maybe if we ask nice?
Max: I already tried. She said sleep time is sleep time.
Lily: Sleep time is boring time.

Lily: Spaghetti is my favorite.
Max: How do you say it? Spa-getti?
Lily: Yes! Spaghetti!
Max: Spaghetti. I say that too.
Lily: With the red sauce. Yummy.
Max: I like cheesy one.
Lily: Mac and cheese?
Max: Yes! Yellow and stretchy.
Lily: Now I am hungry.

Max: You happy today?
Lily: Yes! We are going to park later!
Max: I love park!
Lily: The slide is my favorite. The twisty one!
Max: I like swings. Go high high!
Lily: I am scared of going too high.
Max: Swings are safe. Daddy hold me first time.
Lily: Maybe I try if you hold my hand.
Max: Okay I hold your hand. We go together.

Lily: I have baby sister.
Max: Is she nice?
Lily: Sometimes. She cries a lot.
Max: Why she cries?
Lily: She cannot talk yet. So she cries to say stuff.
Max: Like when I was a baby?
Lily: Yes! We all was babies.
Max: Even Mommy and Daddy?
Lily: Yes! They was tiny babies!
Max: Tiny Daddy. Funny.

Lily: Me too! We same!

Max: Seven eight nine TEN!
Lily: We counted!
Max: I know more! Eleven.. Twelve..
Lily: Thirteen fourteen..
Max: I forget what come after.
Lily: Me too. Fifteen?
Max: I think so. Fifteen!
Lily: We so smart.

Lily: Let's play doctor.
Max: I will be the doctor. You be sick.
Lily: Okay. My stomach hurt.
Max: Open mouth. Speak up.

Max: You have too many cookies inside.

Lily: That not fun medicine.
Max: Sorry. Doctor orders.

Lily: Yes. Silly little frog.

Lily: Okay. I do magic again. Poof! You a dragon!
Max: ROAARRR! Thank you princess.

Lily: With carrot nose?
Max: And button eyes!
Lily: I get scarf for him!
Max: We can name him. Mr. Snowy!
Lily: Mr. Snowy! Hi Mr. Snowy!

Max: I am mad today.
Lily: Why are you mad?
Max: My sister broke my crayon. My red one.
Lily: No. Red is important.
Max: I know! How I color fire now?
Lily: Use orange?
Max: Orange not same.
Lily: I have red. You can use mine.
Max: Really? You best friend.
Lily: I know.

Lily: My fish died.
Max: No. Where did it go?
Lily: Daddy said it went to sleep forever.
Max: Forever sleep?
Lily: Yeah. I am sad.
Max: I hug you.
Lily: Thank you. You nice.
Max: Can we get a new fish?
Lily: Mommy says maybe. Maybe orange one.

Max: Pretty colors. Pink and orange and purple.
Lily: Sky is so pretty.

Lily: Maybe angels. Mommy says maybe.

Lily: Okay. Here. Pretend cake.
Max: Yummy. What flavor?
Lily: Strawberry and rainbow.
Max: Rainbow not a flavor.
Lily: In my cake it is.

Max: Okay. !
Lily: Baby. What wrong?

Max: Okay. Sing twinkle twinkle.

Lily: Look how fast!

Max: Do again!
Lily: Okay okay. One two free.. !
Max: Again again!

Max: You be the dragon, I be the princess.
Lily: Okay. ROAAARRR!
Max: No! Dragon coming! I run!
Lily: I catch you! !
Max: No wait. I magic princess. Poof! You a frog now!
Lily: I am a frog?
Max: Yes. Silly little frog.
Lily: I want to be dragon again!
Max: Okay. I do magic again. Poof! You a dragon!
Lily: ROAARRR! Thank you princess.

Lily: Look! My ball goes bouncy bouncy!
Max: Give me! I want bouncy too!
Lily: No! Mine ball!
Max: Please? I will be careful.
Lily: Okay. One turn. Then mine again.
Max: Thank you!
Lily: Catch! Throw it back!
Max: I caught it! I caught it!

Max: You happy today?
Lily: Yes! We are going to park later!
Max: I love park!
Lily: The slide is my favorite. The twisty one!
Max: I like swings. Go high high!
Lily: I am scared of going too high.
Max: Swings are safe. Daddy hold me first time.
Lily: Maybe I try if you hold my hand.
Max: Okay I hold your hand. We go together.

Max: Me too me too!
Lily: Apple juice. Not orange. Orange is sour.
Max: I like orange.
Lily: You do? It sour!
Max: I like sour.

Lily: Okay we both weird.

Max: What he wrong about?
Lily: He says rain come from clouds but I think from sky shower.
Max: Hm. Maybe same thing.

Max: I want to be dragon again!
Lily: Okay. I do magic again. Poof! You a dragon!
Max: ROAARRR! Thank you princess.

Max: Count with me! One two three!
Lily: Four five six!
Max: Seven eight nine TEN!
Lily: We counted!
Max: I know more! Eleven.. Twelve..
Lily: Thirteen fourteen..
Max: I forget what come after.
Lily: Me too. Fifteen?
Max: I think so. Fifteen!
Lily: We so smart.

Max: Dolly is sleeping.
Lily: Why she is sleeping?
Max: Because she tired. Like me at night.
Lily: I tuck her in?
Max: Okay but soft. She tiny.
Lily: Night night dolly.
Max: She sayss thank you.
Lily: Can I hold her now?
Max: After she wake up.

Max: I am mad today.
Lily: Why are you mad?
Max: My sister broke my crayon. My red one.
Lily: No. Red is important.
Max: I know! How I color fire now?
Lily: Use orange?
Max: Orange not same.
Lily: I have red. You can use mine.
Max: Really? You best friend.
Lily: I know.

Max: Let's play doctor.
Lily: I will be the doctor. You be sick.
Max: Okay. My stomach hurt.
Lily: Open mouth. Speak up.

Lily: You have too many cookies inside.
Max: What is the medicine?
Lily: No more cookies. And drink water.
Max: That not fun medicine.
Lily: Sorry. Doctor orders.

Lily: Okay. One turn. Then mine again.
Max: Thank you!
Lily: Catch! Throw it back!
Max: I caught it! I caught it!

Lily: Where? Where?

Lily: Okay. Poor butterfly.

Lily: I love park!

Lily: I like swings. Go high high!
Max: I am scared of going too high.
Lily: Swings are safe. Daddy hold me first time.
Max: Maybe I try if you hold my hand.
Lily: Okay I hold your hand. We go together.

Lily: You scared of spiders?

Lily: Eight. Eight legs!

Lily: I have two legs.
Max: Me too! We same!

Max: One more is never enough.
Lily: I know. I always want more.

Lily: Yes! Mr. Bear and Bunny. Best friends!

Lily: I am making pretend cake.
Max: For who?
Lily: For my teddy birthday.
Max: Today teddy birthday?
Lily: Yes! He three years old. Same as me!
Max: I want cake too.
Lily: Okay. Here. Pretend cake.
Max: Yummy. What flavor?
Lily: Strawberry and rainbow.
Max: Rainbow not a flavor.
Lily: In my cake it is.

Lily: Let's play doctor.
Max: I will be the doctor. You be sick.
Lily: Okay. My stomach hurt.
Max: Open mouth. Speak up.

Max: You have too many cookies inside.
Lily: What is the medicine?
Max: No more cookies. And drink water.
Lily: That not fun medicine.
Max: Sorry. Doctor orders.

Lily: You scared of spiders?
Max: Yes! Big no no!
Lily: Me too. They have too many legs.
Max: How many legs?
Lily: Eight. Eight legs!
Max: Eight! That a LOT of legs.
Lily: I have two legs.
Max: Me too! We same!

Max: Dolly is sleeping.
Lily: Why she is sleeping?
Max: Because she tired. Like me at night.
Lily: I tuck her in?
Max: Okay but soft. She tiny.
Lily: Night night dolly.
Max: She sayss thank you.
Lily: Can I hold her now?
Max: After she wake up.

Lily: I am not sleepy.
Max: Me neither. But they turning off lights.
Lily: I want to stay up. Watch TV.
Max: Me too. Cartoons!
Lily: Mommy says one more cartoon. Then sleep.
Max: One more is never enough.
Lily: I know. I always want more.
Max: Maybe if we ask nice?
Lily: I already tried. She said sleep time is sleep time.
Max: Sleep time is boring time.

Max: You be the dragon, I be the princess.
Lily: Okay. ROAAARRR!
Max: No! Dragon coming! I run!
Lily: I catch you! !
Max: No wait. I magic princess. Poof! You a frog now!
Lily: I am a frog?
Max: Yes. Silly little frog.
Lily: I want to be dragon again!
Max: Okay. I do magic again. Poof! You a dragon!
Lily: ROAARRR! Thank you princess.

Lily: Pink! No wait. Purple!
Max: Mine is blue. Sky blue.
Lily: Blue is nice. Like water!
Max: And sky. And blueberries.
Lily: Blueberries are purple.
Max: No they blue. Look at the name. BLUE-berry.
Lily: Yeah. You right.

Lily: That not free. That three.
Max: I know. Free mean three.
Lily: Okay. I have five fingers. On one hand.
Max: Two hands how many?
Lily: Umm. Five.. And five..
Max: Ten! Five plus five is ten!
Lily: How do you know that?
Max: Daddy taught me. He very smart.

Lily: Is she nice?
Max: Sometimes. She cries a lot.
Lily: Why she cries?
Max: She cannot talk yet. So she cries to say stuff.
Lily: Like when I was a baby?
Max: Yes! We all was babies.
Lily: Even Mommy and Daddy?
Max: Yes! They was tiny babies!
Lily: Tiny Daddy. Funny.

Max: I do not like broccoli.
Lily: Me neither. It green and yucky.

Lily: I don't want to be big.
Max: Me neither.
Lily: If I eat it can I have cookie?
Max: I always ask that too.
Lily: What Mommy says?
Max: She sayss maybe. Maybe means yes sometimes.

Max: Seven eight nine TEN!
Lily: We counted!
Max: I know more! Eleven.. Twelve..
Lily: Thirteen fourteen..
Max: I forget what come after.
Lily: Me too. Fifteen?
Max: I think so. Fifteen!
Lily: We so smart.

Max: Let's play doctor.
Lily: I will be the doctor. You be sick.
Max: Okay. My stomach hurt.
Lily: Open mouth. Speak up.

Lily: You have too many cookies inside.
Max: What is the medicine?
Lily: No more cookies. And drink water.
Max: That not fun medicine.
Lily: Sorry. Doctor orders.

Lily: Look! My ball goes bouncy bouncy!

Lily: No! Mine ball!

Lily: Okay. One turn. Then mine again.
Max: Thank you!
Lily: Catch! Throw it back!
Max: I caught it! I caught it!

Max: Now I am hungry.

Max: We same! We pick easy names.

Max: Yes! Mr. Bear and Bunny. Best friends!

Lily: No! All gone.
Max: We can build again? Bigger?
Lily: Yes! Super big tower!

Lily: Okay. Poor butterfly.

Lily: Sorry. Doctor orders.

Lily: She love everyone. She sayss yes.

Lily: Okay but soft. She tiny.
Max: Night night dolly.
Lily: She sayss thank you.
Max: Can I hold her now?
Lily: After she wake up.

Lily: He says rain come from clouds but I think from sky shower.
Max: Hm. Maybe same thing.

Max: Yes. Silly little frog.

Max: Okay. I do magic again. Poof! You a dragon!
Lily: ROAARRR! Thank you princess.

Max: Daddy says no monsters.
Lily: But what if he wrong?
Max: He never wrong. He a daddy.
Lily: My daddy wrong sometimes.
Max: What he wrong about?
Lily: He says rain come from clouds but I think from sky shower.
Max: Hm. Maybe same thing.

Lily: Grandma coming today!
Max: Grandma gives cookies?
Lily: Always! And she hug so warm.
Max: My grandma smell like flowers.
Lily: Mine smell like cake.
Max: Best smells!
Lily: I love Grandma so much.
Max: Me too. Even she not my grandma.
Lily: Maybe she can be your grandma too.
Max: I ask her? She sayss yes?
Lily: She love everyone. She sayss yes.

Lily: I am the mommy, you the baby.
Max: Okay. !

Lily: What is your favorite color?
Max: Pink! No wait. Purple!
Lily: Mine is blue. Sky blue.
Max: Blue is nice. Like water!
Lily: And sky. And blueberries.
Max: Blueberries are purple.
Lily: No they blue. Look at the name. BLUE-berry.
Max: Yeah. You right.

Lily: For who?

Lily: Yummy. What flavor?

Max: I forget what come after.

Max: I think so. Fifteen!
Lily: We so smart.

Lily: Thank you. You nice.

Lily: Mommy says maybe. Maybe orange one.

Max: She sayss maybe. Maybe means yes sometimes.

Lily: Mine is blue. Sky blue.
Max: Blue is nice. Like water!
Lily: And sky. And blueberries.
Max: Blueberries are purple.
Lily: No they blue. Look at the name. BLUE-berry.
Max: Yeah. You right.

Lily: I am building tower. Very very tall.
Max: I help?
Lily: Yes. Put block here.
Max: Like this?
Lily: No no. Careful. Slow.
Max: Oops. Fell down.
Lily: No! All gone.
Max: We can build again? Bigger?
Lily: Yes! Super big tower!

Max: Snow!! Look look!
Lily: WHERE? I do not see!
Max: Outside window! White everywhere!
Lily: SNOW! We make snowman?
Max: Yes! Big round one!
Lily: With carrot nose?
Max: And button eyes!
Lily: I get scarf for him!
Max: We can name him. Mr. Snowy!
Lily: Mr. Snowy! Hi Mr. Snowy!

Max: I am scared of dark.
Lily: Me too. Monsters in dark.
Max: Daddy says no monsters.
Lily: But what if he wrong?
Max: He never wrong. He a daddy.
Lily: My daddy wrong sometimes.
Max: What he wrong about?
Lily: He says rain come from clouds but I think from sky shower.
Max: Hm. Maybe same thing.

Lily: I am the mommy, you the baby.
Max: Okay. !
Lily: Baby. What wrong?
Max: Hungry! !
Lily: Here. Pretend milk.
Max: Thank you mommy.
Lily: Now go sleep. It night time.
Max: I am not sleepy!
Lily: Baby you need sleep. I sing song.
Max: Okay. Sing twinkle twinkle.
Lily: Twinkle twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are..

Max: I am mad today.
Lily: Why are you mad?
Max: My sister broke my crayon. My red one.
Lily: No. Red is important.
Max: I know! How I color fire now?
Lily: Use orange?
Max: Orange not same.
Lily: I have red. You can use mine.
Max: Really? You best friend.
Lily: I know.

Lily: Count with me! One two three!
Max: Four five six!
Lily: Seven eight nine TEN!
Max: We counted!
Lily: I know more! Eleven.. Twelve..
Max: Thirteen fourteen..
Lily: I forget what come after.
Max: Me too. Fifteen?
Lily: I think so. Fifteen!
Max: We so smart.

Lily: You be the dragon, I be the princess.
Max: Okay. ROAAARRR!
Lily: No! Dragon coming! I run!
Max: I catch you! !
Lily: No wait. I magic princess. Poof! You a frog now!
Max: I am a frog?
Lily: Yes. Silly little frog.
Max: I want to be dragon again!
Lily: Okay. I do magic again. Poof! You a dragon!
Max: ROAARRR! Thank you princess.

Max: Look! My ball goes bouncy bouncy!
Lily: Give me! I want bouncy too!
Max: No! Mine ball!
Lily: Please? I will be careful.
Max: Okay. One turn. Then mine again.
Lily: Thank you!
Max: Catch! Throw it back!
Lily: I caught it! I caught it!

Lily: Teddy bear keep me safe at night.
Max: I have bunny. Pink bunny.
Lily: What is the bunny's name?
Max: Bunny.
Lily: That bunny name? Just Bunny?
Max: Yes. That his name.
Lily: My teddy name is Mr. Bear.
Max: We same! We pick easy names.
Lily: They best friends like us.
Max: Yes! Mr. Bear and Bunny. Best friends!

Lily: I have baby sister.
Max: Is she nice?
Lily: Sometimes. She cries a lot.
Max: Why she cries?
Lily: She cannot talk yet. So she cries to say stuff.
Max: Like when I was a baby?
Lily: Yes! We all was babies.
Max: Even Mommy and Daddy?
Lily: Yes! They was tiny babies!
Max: Tiny Daddy. Funny.

Lily: I am scared of dark.
Max: Me too. Monsters in dark.
Lily: Daddy says no monsters.
Max: But what if he wrong?
Lily: He never wrong. He a daddy.
Max: My daddy wrong sometimes.
Lily: What he wrong about?
Max: He says rain come from clouds but I think from sky shower.
Lily: Hm. Maybe same thing.

Lily: I want more juice!
Max: Me too me too!
Lily: Apple juice. Not orange. Orange is sour.
Max: I like orange.
Lily: You do? It sour!
Max: I like sour.
Lily: That weird.
Max: You weird!
Lily: Okay we both weird.

Max: It is raining outside.
Lily: No playground.
Max: But puddles!
Lily: Yes puddles!
Max: Jump in puddles! Splash!
Lily: Mommy says no. Shoes get wet.
Max: I take shoes off!
Lily: You sneaky.
Max: She still say no.
Lily: Mommys always say no to fun stuff.

Lily: You scared of spiders?
Max: Yes! Big no no!
Lily: Me too. They have too many legs.
Max: How many legs?
Lily: Eight. Eight legs!
Max: Eight! That a LOT of legs.
Lily: I have two legs.
Max: Me too! We same!

Lily: Spaghetti is my favorite.
Max: How do you say it? Spa-getti?
Lily: Yes! Spaghetti!
Max: Spaghetti. I say that too.
Lily: With the red sauce. Yummy.
Max: I like cheesy one.
Lily: Mac and cheese?
Max: Yes! Yellow and stretchy.
Lily: Now I am hungry.

Max: Me neither. It green and yucky.
Lily: Mommy says eat it. It make you big.
Max: I don't want to be big.
Lily: Me neither.
Max: If I eat it can I have cookie?
Lily: I always ask that too.
Max: What Mommy says?
Lily: She sayss maybe. Maybe means yes sometimes.

Max: I am building tower. Very very tall.
Lily: I help?
Max: Yes. Put block here.
Lily: Like this?
Max: No no. Careful. Slow.
Lily: Oops. Fell down.
Max: No! All gone.
Lily: We can build again? Bigger?
Max: Yes! Super big tower!

Lily: Okay. ROAAARRR!
Max: No! Dragon coming! I run!
Lily: I catch you! !
Max: No wait. I magic princess. Poof! You a frog now!
Lily: I am a frog?
Max: Yes. Silly little frog.
Lily: I want to be dragon again!
Max: Okay. I do magic again. Poof! You a dragon!
Lily: ROAARRR! Thank you princess.
